problem: In the figure shown, major arc $\widehat{AD}$ and minor arc $\widehat{BC}$ have the same center $O$. Also, $A$ lies between $O$ and $B$, and $D$ lies between $O$ and $C$. Major arc $\widehat{AD}$, minor arc $\widehat{BC}$, and each of the two segments $\overline{AB}$ and $\overline{CD}$ have length $2\pi$. What is the distance from $O$ to $A$?
